# [Role Name] — Role Description

*Template. A role is an area of authority and accountability held by one person.
Roles are not permanent — they are held until the circle reviews or reassigns them.*

---

## Purpose

*One sentence: what does this role exist to achieve?*

## Domain

*What can the role-holder decide without consulting the circle?*

**May decide:**
- [e.g. format and content of weekly status update to the cooperative]
- [e.g. scheduling of their own working time within agreed capacity]

**Must consult the circle before:**
- [e.g. any commitment of cooperative resources beyond [X]]
- [e.g. representing the cooperative externally on this topic]

## Accountabilities

*Ongoing obligations of this role — not tasks, but continuing responsibilities.*

- [ ] [e.g. Maintaining accurate records of all agreements in this domain]
- [ ] [e.g. Flagging tensions in this domain to the circle within one week of noticing them]
- [ ] [e.g. Preparing a brief summary for each circle meeting]

## Current Role-Holder

| | |
|--|--|
| **Name** | [name] |
| **Since** | [date] |
| **Next review** | [date] |

## Review Criteria

*How will the circle know if this role needs to change? When should it be reassigned?*

- [e.g. Role is working well when: members can access X without having to ask Y]
- [e.g. Signal that role needs review: more than one person regularly doing this work informally]

---

*This role description was agreed by consent on [date].*
*Held by: [name] from [date] to [next review date]*
